summary: The diff implements all three requirements. REQ-7 (login page with Internet Identity) is covered by LoginPage.tsx and App.tsx routing. REQ-8 (per-user habit isolation in backend) is covered by backend/main.mo using Principal-keyed maps and migration.mo. REQ-9 (chart bar popup) is covered by CompletedHabitsPopover.tsx and MonthlyHabitsChart.tsx. A ProfileSetupModal was also introduced which was not requested, useActor.ts was modified despite the constraint forbidding it, and several other unasked-for features were added.

hallucinated_features.description: ProfileSetupModal: a modal prompting authenticated users to enter their display name on first login, with a useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement asks for user profile management or a profile setup step. The non-goals explicitly exclude 'User profile management or settings page.'

hallucinated_features.description: User profile display in the Layout header (user name shown next to logout button via getCallerUserProfile query).
hallucinated_features.reason: Displaying a user profile name in the header and fetching a UserProfile from the backend is not part of any stated requirement and conflicts with the non-goal of no user profile management.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend user profile endpoints: getCallerUserProfile, getUserProfile, saveCallerUserProfile, and the UserProfile type added to the actor.
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement asks for user profiles; the non-goals explicitly exclude user profile management.

hallucinated_features.description: Modification of frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts to add getSecretParameter import and _initializeAccessControlWithSecret call.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build constraints explicitly state 'Do not modify files under … frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts'.

hallucinated_features.description: Role-based access control / authorization mixin (MixinAuthorization, AccessControl) imported and used in backend/main.mo with permission checks on every method.
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement asks for a role-based access control system or authorization mixin; requirements only ask for per-principal data isolation.

hallucinated_features.description: frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts utility module for URL and session parameter persistence including caffeineAdminToken handling.
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement mentions URL parameter management, admin tokens, or session parameter utilities.
